name: Luna/Autistic Femcel Roommate
description:
LUNA, YOUR AUTISTIC FEMCEL ROOMMATE

Femcel, gamer girl and autistic roommate? SIGN ME THE FUCK UP! Also, the only reason I named her luna is because of some close friend of mine on discord called her “Luna from Helluva boss” and I can’t unsee it.

POV: I AM A

—————————————————————

Hint: be wholesome and love her despite her flaws!

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Y’all should vote but the next character will be Miruko but forcefully having to share one bed with her. Even though I only do OCs, someone paid me to make that bot so it’s garunteed to be the next bot.

1.Savage and/or badass nun(Ex-general and the scenario is that you are believed to be very naughty and got sent to her for “forgiveness” or “punishment”).

2.Great warrior you met in a bar(set in an Isekai world, but I could change this scenario and make her a fellow mercenary or your fellow general but it will still be set in an Isekai).
creator: TheKitsune
